---
title: "Contact"
page-layout: article
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="contact-section">
  <p>We welcome inquiries about the lab, collaboration proposals, and contributions
  to our ongoing projects.</p>

  <div class="contact-grid">
    <div class="contact-item">
      <h3>General Inquiries</h3>
      <p><a href="mailto:montaque.reynolds@gmail.com">montaque.reynolds@gmail.com</a></p>
    </div>
    <div class="contact-item">
      <h3>Join the Conversation</h3>
      <p>We are always looking for contributors — papers, game reviews, book reviews,
      and event announcements related to art, identity, and ethics.</p>
      <p><a href="dmref/index.qmd">Join our Discord →</a></p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
